response.justification: The candidate is a full-stack software engineer with experience in web, mobile, and some embedded systems, but has no demonstrated background in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, GPU architecture, deep neural network optimization, or hardware-software co-design. The role requires deep hardware-level expertise that is entirely absent from this resume, and the educational background (BS in CS) without the specialized hardware focus does not align with a Principal Performance Architect position in AI accelerator design.
strengths: Long tenure (10+ years) as a senior/staff engineer demonstrating sustained technical growth
Some low-level systems exposure via C/C++ at National Instruments and DLang async I/O work
Strong software engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks, open-source contributions)
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator experience
No deep learning, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or DNN training/inference optimization background
Educational and professional profile is web/full-stack focused, not hardware architecture

key_factors.factor: Lack of SoC/IP modeling and hardware architecture experience
No AI accelerator or deep-learning workload optimization background
Some systems/embedded and low-level C/C++ exposure
